whatWasSeen: A person inside the accommodation area was observed wearing footwear that did not meet Transocean standards. The footwear was not closed‑toe with a fixed heel, as required.
whatWasDiscussed: I stopped the individual and reminded him of the footwear requirements. We discussed that this information is clearly communicated during all welcome‑onboard meetings and that proper footwear is required to ensure personal safety inside the accommodation. I referred him to Transocean’s Personal Protective Equipment Standard, which states that all personnel, including off‑tour personnel, must wear closed‑toe and fixed‑heel footwear inside the accommodation.
whatWasReinforced: The individual acknowledged the reminder and agreed to change into footwear that complies with Transocean standards. He also agreed to remain mindful of the requirement going forward.

whatWasSeen: Mens jeg var ute på brennerbom på styrbord side oppdaget jeg at det var en grind som ikke var sikret mot sjøen. Det vil si hvis noen brukte denne som støtte kunne denne åpnes og du ville da fjernet en barriere mot sjø. Sjekket også brennebom babord side. Var likt der. På begge sider manglet det carbinkroker for å sikre grind.
whatWasDiscussed: Vi ble enige om at vi måtte finne noe og sikre disse på.
whatWasReinforced: Vi gikk og fant wire og carbinkroker og monterte disse opp på begge sider.
commentsAddedByRigLeadership: Veldig god observasjon og aksjon. Viktig at riktig gate ut til brennerbom holdes åpen og de andre stengt og låst med karabin, alt ettersom hvilken vinkel vi opererer med på bommen. Ch.M

whatWasSeen: Scaffold in test area is poor, lots of trip hazard and open spots to step into, this is the well test area
whatWasDiscussed: Stay alert and look where you put your feet.
whatWasReinforced: I find it strange that this installation is approved by certified personnel.. test crew to look after each other all time
commentsAddedByRigLeadership: You have a scaffolder onboard for this purpose, he is yours to utilize at any time if scaffold needs to be improved. Ch.M

whatWasSeen: Observed tools left on the step outside the work area, creating a potential for a slip or fall when personnel entered or exited the area.
whatWasDiscussed: Moved the tools from the step and informed personnel that tools must be stored in the correct place when not in use, reinforcing proper tool storage discipline to prevent repeat occurrences.
whatWasReinforced: Personnel explained that the tools had been left behind in error while they were carrying out another task. They acknowledged the issue, agreed to be more careful in future, and conducted a site inspection to ensure no additional tools were left in the area.
commentsAddedByRigLeadership: Good observation and action. Ch.M

whatWasSeen: God handover imellom skift
whatWasDiscussed: Vi skulle utføre en rov operasjon på utstyr som i utgangspktet ikke er tenkt operert subsea eller med ROV i utgangspunktet. Det var blitt lagd utstyr som for å installere qd med ventiler vha ROV subsea. Fikk en god handover på funksjon og design av utstyret. Samt tanker om hvordan avtroppende skift hadde sett for seg å utføre operasjonen.
whatWasReinforced: Tok en runde på arbeidsstedet og gjorde våre egne vurderinger og la disse til de vi fikk handet over. Gjorde tool klar i ROV T4 arm i god tid mens det ble utført trykktesting. Operasjon ble utført med suksess
